case_title: ZEIN A. YOUNTCHI ET AL VS. INGRID L. PEREZ

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT, NOTIFYING COURT OF NEW ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, DEFENDANT SUBMITTED ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT BY PLAINTIFF ZEIN A. YOUNTCHI PER STIPULATED DEFENDANT'S CLAIM ON 02/03/20. AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNTCHI, ZEIN A.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L. HEARING SET FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY INGRID L. PEREZ IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL TO ALLOW PARTIES TO PRESENT ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF ZEIN A. YOUNTCHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INGRID L. PEREZ IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT REPRESENTS TO COURT THAT SHE WILL BE IN SAN FRANCISCO TILL THE END OF THE MONTH. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED BY ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED PRIOR TO TODAYS HEARING AND PLACED IN THE CASE FILE ARE OPENED IN COURT, REVIEWED AND RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-12-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZEIN A. YOUNTCHI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JACOB SHEMESH IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT INGRID L. PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING -MOTION TO VACATE- (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNTCHI, ZEIN A.

DECLARATION OF INGRID PEREZ FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNTCHI, ZEIN A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L. SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATE IN OPEN COURT TO DEFENDANTS ASSERTING A CROSS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF ZEIN A. YOUNTCHI SHALL PAY DEFENDANT INGRID L. PEREZ THE AMOUNT OF $838.00 ONLY. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,253.76 FILED BY YOUNTCHI, ZEIN A. SHEMESH, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DEFENDANT INGRID L. PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II ALLOWS CASE TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNTCHI, ZEIN A. SHEMESH, JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L. $1,253.75 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,298.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY INGRID L. PEREZ SET FOR JAN-03-2020 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-17-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.
DECLARATION OF INGRED L. PEREZ RE: EXIBITS FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L.
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, INGRID L.
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. GRANTED. TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 24, 2020 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW PARTIES TO PRESENT FURTHER EVIDENCE. ALL PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO APPEAR.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ZEIN A. YOUNTCHI IS PRESENT. LUKE VARTULI, PROPERTY MANAGER TESTIFIES ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT INGRID L. PEREZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES VERBALLY STIPULATE IN OPEN COURT THAT DEFENDANT HAS ASSERTED A CROSS-CLAIM AGAINST PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
